	Node.js projects don't require compilation. Project is ready to use.

	Tasks can be configured as needed. Use `npm start` to run the project.

- [x] Launch the Project

## Project Setup Complete

Your Node.js project has been initialized successfully. To get started:

1. Install Node.js and npm from https://nodejs.org/ (if not already installed)
2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies
3. Run `npm start` to run the application
4. Run `npm run dev` for development with auto-reload

The project is ready for development!
